meta.title: Fatih Akman — Full-Stack Developer & Analyst | OGF Solutions
meta.description: Freelance full-stack developer and analyst with OGF Solutions (SRL), Belgium. VAT BE 1031.478.796. Angular, Go, PHP, Laravel, Flutter, enterprise data. PSPO I. Remote, small projects.

about.p1: Currently contributing to a strategic platform for a leading European wholesale industry group, handling architecture, development, monitoring, and production support.
about.p2: I bridge the gap between business stakeholders and technical teams, translating complex requirements into robust, scalable solutions.
about.p3: With 5+ years of experience, I've delivered full-stack applications using Go, PHP, Laravel, Angular, and Flutter, working with enterprise databases like MySQL, IBM i DB2, and PostgreSQL.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Development
fullstack.description: End-to-end web applications with React, Angular, Node.js, PHP, Laravel, and Go.

apicustom.title: Custom APIs
apicustom.description: Design and delivery of tailor-made HTTP APIs: REST or GraphQL, authentication, versioning, documentation (OpenAPI), and integration with your existing systems and partners.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.description: Cross-platform apps with Flutter, Ionic, and native iOS with Swift.

database.title: Database Architecture
database.description: Design and optimization for MySQL, PostgreSQL, and IBM i DB2.

architecture.title: System Architecture
architecture.description: Scalable architecture with monitoring and production support.

analysis.title: Business Analysis
analysis.description: Translating business needs into technical solutions.

product.title: Product Ownership
product.description: PSPO I certified, bridging stakeholders and development teams.

automation.title: Business automation & n8n
automation.description: Workflow automation with n8n: connect CRMs, APIs, notifications, and internal tools. End-to-end process automation for SMEs and larger orgs.

ai.title: AI automation
ai.description: LLM-powered pipelines: summarisation, classification, routing, and copilots wired into your stack — from prototypes to production guardrails.

bots.title: Bots & messaging
bots.description: Chatbots and task bots on Telegram, webhooks, and custom backends — alerts, support flows, and lightweight automation users can talk to.

wallet.title: Loyalty & wallet cards
wallet.description: Digital fidelity / loyalty programmes: passes for Apple Wallet & Google Wallet, paired with iOS & Android apps for businesses (stamps, tiers, campaigns).
